# Forget-leader scenario.
# Verifies that a follower with PreVote+CheckQuorum can grant pre-votes
# immediately after forgetting the leader, without waiting out the election
# timeout. (Without forget-leader, followers would reject pre-votes because
# they recently heard from the leader.)

add-nodes id=1,2,3 voters=1,2,3
----
INFO 1 switched to configuration voters=(1 2 3)
INFO 1 became follower at term 0
INFO 2 switched to configuration voters=(1 2 3)
INFO 2 became follower at term 0
INFO 3 switched to configuration voters=(1 2 3)
INFO 3 became follower at term 0

campaign id=1
----
INFO 1 is starting a new election
INFO 1 became StateCandidate at term 1

stabilize
----
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateCandidate term=1 commit=0
> 2 receiving MsgRequestVote from 1
> 2 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=0
> 3 receiving MsgRequestVote from 1
> 3 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=0
> 1 receiving MsgRequestVoteResponse from 2
> 1 receiving MsgRequestVoteResponse from 3
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=0
> 2 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 2 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=0
> 3 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 3 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=0
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 2
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 3
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=1
> 2 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 2 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=1
> 3 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 3 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=1
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 2
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 3

status id=1
----
id=1 state=StateLeader term=1 lead=1 commit=1 lastIndex=1

# Node 2 forgets the leader.
forget-leader id=2
----
ok

status id=2
----
id=2 state=StateFollower term=1 lead=0 commit=1 lastIndex=1

# Now if 2 campaigns, the election can proceed without waiting election timeout.
campaign id=2
----
INFO 2 is starting a new election
INFO 2 became StateCandidate at term 2

stabilize
----
> 2 handling Ready: state=StateCandidate term=2 commit=1
> 3 receiving MsgRequestVote from 2
> 3 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=2 commit=1
> 1 receiving MsgRequestVote from 2
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=2 commit=1
> 2 receiving MsgRequestVoteResponse from 3
> 2 receiving MsgRequestVoteResponse from 1
> 2 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=2 commit=1
> 3 receiving MsgAppend from 2
> 3 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=2 commit=1
> 1 receiving MsgAppend from 2
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=2 commit=1
> 2 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 3
> 2 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 1
> 2 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=2 commit=2
> 3 receiving MsgAppend from 2
> 3 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=2 commit=2
> 1 receiving MsgAppend from 2
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=2 commit=2
> 2 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 3
> 2 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 1

status id=2
----
id=2 state=StateLeader term=2 lead=2 commit=2 lastIndex=2
